Soul Gospel Singer || Composer & Songwriter || DOVVSU Ambassador || Warrior Queen

Portfolio

Ministry impact, media highlights, and recognitions that reflect Ewura Abena's mission.

Ministry Impact

Worship Outreach

Leading worship and spiritual gatherings in churches, community events, and international faith programs.

Mentorship

Supporting the next generation of gospel musicians through discipleship and songwriting mentorship.

Advocacy

Public ministry and advocacy as DOVVSU ambassador focused on dignity and community protection.

Media Gallery

Show Them

SHOW THEM is prayer chant song birthed from deep groaning and supplication. It is a call on the Lord to rise to our defense for his own glory's sake. As you sing and pray with this song, may the God who answered Elijah by fire answer you speedily

All is Well

It is a declaration of the truth and our truth, that the God who delights in the prosperity of his children is our God and surely he will prosper everything that concerns me

Awards & Recognition

Song 'This Far' Recognition

The success of 'This Far' earned numerous nominations and recognition, including Songwriter of the Year, Female Vocal Performance, and Gospel Song of the Year at Vodafone Ghana Music Awards 2023, Ghana Music Awards UK 2023, and Ghana Music Awards Europe.

2023-01-01
